steps.assistant_text: 3-stage chained alloc-cascade ctor (twin of 0x1D7C). The reconstructed body with real reloc callees/symbols had 2 residual diffs: a dataflow-independent as1 scheduler tie where the self reload (lw a2,0x20(sp)) hoists into the gap between the &import_00073B18 lui/addiu. decomp-permuter found that joining the 04C678 init call and the sub->0x28 store onto a single statement re-anchors the as1 schedule so the reload lands after the addiu. Verified IN-TREE via ROM cmp (objdiff alone is unreliable for adjacent-insn swaps — the twin 0x1D7C produced an objdiff false-100 that the ROM rejected).

metadata.verification: in-tree exact: 42/42 words, 0 non-reloc diffs, 12 reloc records identical to expected; full ROM byte-identical to baserom (make: ROM OK); cracked by decomp-permuter statement-join
